EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} changed rows in the table
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} changed rows in the table "{object.value}.{object.name}"
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} failed to change rows in the table "{object.value}.{object.name}"
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} failed to change rows in the table
